scripts.prisma:push:development: cross-env NODE_ENV=development ENV_FILE=.env.development node script/prisma-run.js db push
scripts.prisma:generate:development: cross-env NODE_ENV=development ENV_FILE=.env.development node script/prisma-run.js generate
scripts.prisma:deploy:development: npm run prisma:push:development && npm run prisma:generate:development
scripts.prisma:push:staging: cross-env NODE_ENV=staging ENV_FILE=.env.staging node script/prisma-run.js db push
scripts.prisma:generate:staging: cross-env NODE_ENV=staging ENV_FILE=.env.staging node script/prisma-run.js generate
scripts.prisma:deploy:staging: npm run prisma:push:staging && npm run prisma:generate:staging
scripts.prisma:push:production: cross-env NODE_ENV=production ENV_FILE=.env.production node script/prisma-run.js db push
scripts.prisma:generate:production: cross-env NODE_ENV=production ENV_FILE=.env.production node script/prisma-run.js generate
scripts.prisma:deploy:production: npm run prisma:push:production && npm run prisma:generate:production
